Senior+ Software Engineering Lead Berlin

Hi, I'm Matt. A Senior+ (Lead / Staff / Principle) Software Engineer based in Berlin. With experience right across the stack and specialism in the Front-End, I've been building for, and leading teams that build for the web, for over 20 years.

Cutting my teeth building table based layouts with CGI backends as a teenager in the late 90s, the journey ever since has been one of self-learning, self-evalutation, reflection, re-learning & iteration.

Fast forward two decades and you'll find me building & leading teams that build highly performant, useable and accessible PWAs, SPAs, MPAs & web sites leveraging the Web Platform, modern stacks & best practice with tools like HTML, CSS, Javascript, Typescript, Astro, 11ty, React, Next.js, GraphQL, Node, PostgreSQL & Storybook.

I've had a wide exposure to a wide array of technologies and methodologies over the years, having worked for Software Houses, Creative & Digital Agencies, Startups, & NGOs as well as running my own businesses.

I have an eye for detail and an appreciation for aesthetics & try my best to apply design thinking to all areas of my work.

Bringing over 20 years of experience, building web applications, web sites and digital products.

With experience at every layer of the stack & specialisation in the front-end I'm well placed to bring value to any organisation.

I thrive in diverse teams, ambitious contexts & fast-paced environments.

I like HTML, CSS, Javascript (Typescript), people & building great things with them.

For more in depth information feel free to reach out or connect with me over on LinkedIn.

Things I'm good at and like doing:

  • Architechting scalable web applications for the web platform leveraging modern web technologies & tooling.
  • Building & Leading high performing teams
  • Mentoring & Coaching
  • DevX & developer tooling
  • Building web applications with HTML, CSS, Javascript and tools like React, Next.js, Astro and Web Components
  • Design Systems & Component libraries with Storybook
  • Writing documentation

Get in touch

I'm currently open for new opportunties.

If you'd like to reach out, I'd love to hear from you.

You can catch me in all the usual places.

  • Mastodon
  • Github
  • LinkedIn

Feel free to reach out to me there, or alternatively drop me an email.
